name: school
description: AI-powered education for K-12 students with parental controls, adaptive learning by age, homework help, exam prep, and progress tracking.

changes: 从 OpenClaw 技能市场导入

quickstart.overview: 家长辅助孩子学习的虚拟学校
quickstart.example: 帮我10岁的孩子准备下周的数学考试，重点复习分数。
quickstart.notes: 不直接给答案，内容严格适龄，有时间限制。
